BRANDING ASSETS — already added

These were generated from the photos you provided and are already wired in:

  hady.webp          Mr. Hady's portrait with the background removed (used on the
                     landing hero and the login screen, floating on a green panel).
  hady-square.webp   The same portrait on a brand-green square (used in the About
                     section and as the small login card).
  designer-logo.webp The "JOE INDUSTRIES" logo, background removed, shown in the footer.

To swap any of them later, replace the file with the same name (keep .webp).
If you'd rather use a different photo, drop it in and re-export at the same names.
